description.short: DevOps assistant for GCP and GitHub
description.full: SamurAI is a DevOps chatbot that helps your team check Google Cloud infrastructure, read logs, monitor services, and review GitHub activity — all from Microsoft Teams.

commands.title: check logs for errors
commands.description: Search Cloud Logging across GCP projects

commands.title: list services
commands.description: Check Cloud Run services, PRs, issues, CI/CD

commands.title: create a background task
commands.description: Schedule a recurring or one-shot autonomous task

commands.title: send a message to
commands.description: Send a Teams message to a team member

commands.title: fedramp status
commands.description: FedRAMP compliance dashboard across all control families

commands.title: collect fedramp evidence
commands.description: Run evidence collection for a NIST control family

commands.title: review fedramp document
commands.description: Read and review a FedRAMP policy or procedure

commands.title: generate OSCAL package
commands.description: Generate or update OSCAL SSP, POA&M, or assessment results

commands.title: look up control
commands.description: Look up a NIST 800-53 control (e.g. AC-2, SI-4)
